text:
Once upon a time in a quaint village on the edge of a forest noBIGwoods big enough to call homesBIGwoods.

There lived a young girl named Lucy. Her favorite things were flowers and books, especially stories about witches.

One cloudy afternoon, Lucy decided to gather some flowers to make a beautiful bouquet for her favorite book character. She wandered through the forest, her feet shuffling through soft moss.

In a small clearing, a old tree swinging crooked headziaziazia.

Something glimmered glittery-eyed.

"Oh hello there!" she giggled.

A wise owl hoots.

"A wise old owl didn."

"Why owl?" she asked eagerly.

"Just enjoying the view," the owl owl.

She continued past the owl when a branch snapped.

"Huh."

She peeked into a small hole.

A tiny hedgehog?

"Wicky Wicky!"

She scooped him up. He curled up lovingly.

That night, Lucy imagined wise hedgehog wisdom about friendship.

Just then
